description: Refactor FullTaskManager.jsx (full-screen view) to separate viewing from editing: single click selects a task and shows only a notes preview (no edit form), double click or Edit button opens full edit mode. Tighten layout to reduce empty horizontal space and bring actions closer to task info.
steps: In src/FullTaskManager.jsx, add a new state variable `selectedTaskId` (separate from `expandedTaskId`) for tracking which task is selected for notes preview.
Add a new state variable `editingTaskId` to track which task is in full edit mode (currently this role is served by `expandedTaskId`).
Refactor handleRowClick: single click should set selectedTaskId to the clicked task (toggling off if already selected). It should NOT open the edit form or set expandedTaskId.
Add handleRowDoubleClick: double click should open full edit mode (set editingTaskId, populate edit fields).

When a task is selected (selectedTaskId === task.id) and NOT in edit mode, render a compact read-only notes preview below the task row. Show only the notes text in a light-styled div. No forms, dropdowns, or action buttons.

When a task is in edit mode (editingTaskId === task.id), show the full edit panel with Notes textarea, Status/Priority/Due Date/Group dropdowns, and Save/Cancel/Set Location/Delete buttons (like current expanded area).
Add an Edit button in the task row actions column (beside the reorder arrows) that opens edit mode on click.

Tighten the table header column widths: reduce the Location column from w-12 to w-10, reduce Priority from w-20 to w-16, reduce Due Date from w-24 to w-20. Add a compact Actions column (w-20) that includes Edit button and reorder controls, replacing the current separate w-16 reorder column.
In the task row, use a single-line layout: Status | Task Name | Group badge (compact) | Priority | Due | Location pin | Actions (Edit, Up, Down). This keeps everything close together.
Ensure the selected row has a subtle highlight (bg-indigo-50/50) to indicate selection without being too visually heavy.
All existing functionality must remain intact: task CRUD, groups, colors, location system, ordering, import/export, persistence.
acceptance_criteria: Single clicking a task row in full-screen view selects it and shows a read-only notes preview (if notes exist).
Double clicking a task row opens the full edit panel with all editable fields.
An Edit button in the task row actions area also opens the full edit panel.
The layout is tighter with less empty horizontal space between task info and actions.
Notes preview is read-only with no form elements.
All existing task management features remain functional.
npm run build succeeds without errors.
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm it completes successfully without errors.
